closed_surface: FiniteNonCollapsedEnergyBudget plus energy accounting plus normalized modal growth implies operational boundary compactness cutoff
separations: SphericalMisnerSharpClosure induces FiniteNonCollapsedEnergyBudget only in the restricted spherical class
QL_CollapseGate is retained as an open strengthening
proved: finite non-collapsed energy budget implies a finite modal cutoff for every admissible state
unrestricted UniversalBoundaryCompactness is conditionally closed relative to FiniteNonCollapsedEnergyBudget
spherical Misner-Sharp closure is separated from nonspherical finite-energy closure
QL_CollapseGate remains open and is not used as a theorem
boundary: Conditional surface only; unrestricted UniversalBoundaryCompactness is closed only relative to FiniteNonCollapsedEnergyBudget.
